newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 results (revenue -9.5% to C$502.1M, gross margin +150bps to 20.6%) were reported May 4, and the Q2 dividend ($0.35) was declared with a June 15 record date - both pre-window. A +0.36% move on a sleepy C$0.47B distributor reflects nothing new.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node lens: the AI-supply-chain link (pumps/MRO/service optionality into reshoring) is thin and unchanged. No new evidence since June 9; Q1 and dividend both pre-window. Rank 61 stands.
verdicts.primaryRisk: No durable AI-chain exposure; cyclical equipment demand softening
verdicts.bull: Diversified industrial distributor with improving gross margin and solid backlog; cheap C$0.47B name.
verdicts.neutral: Sleepy distributor; AI-node tie is qualitative optionality, not a real revenue driver.
verdicts.bear: Revenue declining (-9.5% Q1); no AI exposure to justify a strict latent-node slot.
